headline: Jefferies Is Betting on Robinhood to Become a ‘Super App.’ Is That Possible in the Age of AI?
summary: Jefferies initiated coverage of Robinhood with a Buy rating and says it appears clear that the company is becoming a financial super app.

raw.headline: Jefferies Is Betting on Robinhood to Become a ‘Super App.’ Is That Possible in the Age of AI?
raw.summary: Jefferies initiated coverage of Robinhood with a Buy rating and says it appears clear that the company is becoming a financial super app.

headline: AI may replace your financial advisor, MIT professor says — but there's one big hurdle
summary: Artificial intelligence has gotten sophisticated with respect to financial advice. But it doesn't have a legal obligation to put clients first.

raw.headline: AI may replace your financial advisor, MIT professor says — but there's one big hurdle
raw.summary: Artificial intelligence has gotten sophisticated with respect to financial advice. But it doesn't have a legal obligation to put clients first.
